textByHash.99476acdf5afcbcc21b48bf18a6f92b0a8909700: Let me squeeze the life from your mortal frame.
textByHash.7c380b57d9c604a6570edce6d3c4dcdf713e1fab: Which non-kin dares enter my tomb?
textByHash.1e207385bbe208a00d7820f53a85ca977d6e0986: You have my gratitude for releasing me, there is still much that needs to be done before Shilo Village is utterly destroyed. Please excuse me, I have plans and people to execute!
textByHash.a25239bb1613b1acacd2cb0b682c4ee25c4c6684: You have my gratitude for releasing my spirit. I have suffered a vengeful and evil existence. I was tricked by Zamorak. He returned my son to me as an undead creature.
textByHash.ce0fdf6c4ee2273179a82b4dd1eddda2a929e8c5: My hatred and bitterness corrupted me. I tried to destroy all life... now I am released. And am grateful to contemplate eternal rest...
